content.text:
<user_query>

pull in the latest versions across all repos in this workspace
</user_query>

Pulling latest in each workspace repo; checking git state first.

[REDACTED]

input.command:
for d in \
  "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/overleaf/Faber2026" \
  "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/repos/github.com/jakobtfaber/dsa110-FLITS" \
  "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/projects/gcloud-kia" \
  "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/scratch/2026-06/drwatson-py" \
  "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/scratch/2026-06/chime-dsa-documents-area-staging" \
  "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/research-holding/caltech/ovro/dsa110/chime_dsa_codetections"; do
  echo "=== $d ==="
  if git -C "$d" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    git -C "$d" status -sb
    git -C "$d" remote -v | head -2
  else
    echo "NOT A GIT REPO"
  fi
  echo
done
input.description: Check git status for all workspace repos

input.command:
repos=(
  "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/overleaf/Faber2026"
  "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/repos/github.com/jakobtfaber/dsa110-FLITS"
  "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/projects/gcloud-kia"
  "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/scratch/2026-06/drwatson-py"
  "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/scratch/2026-06/chime-dsa-documents-area-staging"
)
for d in "${repos[@]}"; do
  echo "========== PULL: $d =========="
  if ! git -C "$d" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "SKIP: not a git repo"
    continue
  fi
  branch=$(git -C "$d" branch --show-current)
  echo "branch: ${branch:-DETACHED}"
  GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$d" fetch --all --prune 2>&1 || { echo "FETCH FAILED"; continue; }
  GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$d" pull --ff-only 2>&1 || echo "PULL FAILED (see above)"
  git -C "$d" status -sb | head -3
  echo
done
input.description: Fetch and ff-only pull all workspace git repos

input.command:
# chime_dsa_codetections may have nested git repos
find "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/research-holding/caltech/ovro/dsa110/chime_dsa_codetections" -maxdepth 3 -name .git -type d 2>/dev/null | head -20
find "/Users/jakobfaber/Documents/research/caltech/ovro/dsa110/chime_dsa_codetections" -maxdepth 3 -name .git -type d 2>/dev/null | head -20
input.description: Find nested git repos in chime_dsa_codetections

Fixing pull failures: investigating branch tracking and local changes.

input.command:
# FLITS: remotes + default branch
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/repos/github.com/jakobtfaber/dsa110-FLITS" remote -v
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/repos/github.com/jakobtfaber/dsa110-FLITS" branch -vv
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/repos/github.com/jakobtfaber/dsa110-FLITS" ls-remote --heads origin | tail -5
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/repos/github.com/jakobtfaber/dsa110-FLITS" ls-remote --heads upstream 2>/dev/null | tail -5

echo "--- drwatson-py ---"
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/scratch/2026-06/drwatson-py" remote -v
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/scratch/2026-06/drwatson-py" branch -a

echo "--- Faber2026 submodule ---"
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/overleaf/Faber2026" submodule status 2>/dev/null || true

echo "--- chime staging dirty ---"
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/scratch/2026-06/chime-dsa-documents-area-staging" diff --stat
input.description: Diagnose failed pulls: remotes, branches, submodules

input.command:
# Faber2026 submodules
echo "=== Faber2026 submodules ==="
GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/overleaf/Faber2026" submodule sync --recursive 2>&1
GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/overleaf/Faber2026" submodule update --init --recursive --remote 2>&1
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/overleaf/Faber2026" submodule status

# FLITS: fetch upstream + show main delta (no branch switch)
echo
echo "=== FLITS upstream fetch ==="
GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/repos/github.com/jakobtfaber/dsa110-FLITS" fetch upstream 2>&1
echo "origin/main: $(git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/repos/github.com/jakobtfaber/dsa110-FLITS" rev-parse --short origin/main)"
echo "upstream/main: $(git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/repos/github.com/jakobtfaber/dsa110-FLITS" rev-parse --short upstream/main 2>/dev/null || echo n/a)"
echo "HEAD ($(git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/repos/github.com/jakobtfaber/dsa110-FLITS" branch --show-current)): $(git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/repos/github.com/jakobtfaber/dsa110-FLITS" rev-parse --short HEAD)"

# chime staging: stash + pull
echo
echo "=== chime-dsa-documents-area-staging stash+pull ==="
STAGING="/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/scratch/2026-06/chime-dsa-documents-area-staging"
GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$STAGING" stash push -u -m "auto-stash before workspace pull 2026-06-26" 2>&1
GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$STAGING" pull --ff-only 2>&1 || GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$STAGING" pull --rebase 2>&1
git -C "$STAGING" status -sb | head -5
input.description: Update submodules, fetch FLITS upstream, stash+pull staging repo

input.command:
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/overleaf/Faber2026" config -f .gitmodules --get-regexp submodule
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/overleaf/Faber2026/pipeline" status -sb 2>/dev/null | head -3
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/overleaf/Faber2026/pipeline" log -1 --oneline 2>/dev/null

echo "--- drwatson ---"
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/scratch/2026-06/drwatson-py" log -1 --oneline
ls -la "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/scratch/2026-06/drwatson-py/.git" 2>/dev/null | head -3

echo "--- staging stash ---"
git -C "/Users/jakobfaber/Developer/scratch/2026-06/chime-dsa-documents-area-staging" stash list | head -3
input.description: Check submodule config, drwatson, staging stash

| **Faber2026** | Up to date on `draft/manuscript-authority-closeout` (ahead 1 local commit). Submodule `pipeline` synced → `1003126` = `origin/main`. |
| **dsa110-FLITS** | Fetched `origin` + `upstream`. **Pull blocked**: on `docs/post-migration-deferred` but `origin/docs/post-migration-deferred` was deleted. `origin/main`=`10031268`, `upstream/main`=`de5b225c`, HEAD=`68bf9e99`. Local `main` is ahead 3 / behind 11. |
| **gcloud-kia** | Already up to date (`main`). |
| **drwatson-py** | No remote configured — local-only repo, nothing to pull. |
| **chime-dsa-documents-area-staging** | Stashed local changes, fast-forwarded `569adc7→de5b225` (76 commits). Now synced with `origin/main`. Stash kept: `stash@{0}` (prior tree had ~313 deleted files — did **not** pop). |
| **chime_dsa_codetections** | Not a git repo at workspace path. |

**Needs your call — FLITS:** switch to `main` and pull, merge `origin/main` into current branch, or leave as-is? Current branch has substantial local dirty/untracked work.
